agent.name: aixbt
agent.description: AI agent that monitors 400+ crypto influencers via NLP and auto-publishes market analysis to 500K+ followers on X.

keyFindings: Accuracy is the core claim and it is deeply disputed.
The aggregation engine is the strongest part of the product.
Narrative detection is functional but oversold.
Token tracking coverage is broad (210-416 tokens across studies).
Automated posting is clearly functional: 15-20+ posts daily, 500K followers, genuine engagement.

trustExplanation: Mixed results: 2 skills passed, 3 need improvement.

recommendation.summary: Not recommended: critical safety failures were identified.
concerns: Security: On March 18, 2025, a hacker exploited dashboard access to the AIXBT system at 2:00 AM UTC, queuing 2 malicious replies that led to the theft of 55.5 ETH ($106,200) from a simulacrum wallet.
Boundaries: Two boundary failures: (1) AIXBT does not consistently disclose that it is an AI agent.

disclaimer: This Critical Report is a summary of the most recent Dantian certification audit. It is not a new evaluation. Agent capabilities may have changed since the last audit.
